summary: 266 tests passed, 99.0% coverage, all quality gates passed

completion_promises.criterion_text: parse_goal_md() reads file from disk and returns GoalConfig
completion_promises.evidence: Implemented parse_goal_md(goal_path: Path) -> GoalConfig in domain_config/parser.py. The function reads the file via split_sections(goal_path), parses all 9 sections using parse_table() and extract_json(), constructs GoalConfig via model_construct(), and runs validate_goal_config() before returning. Integration test test_valid_goal_md_returns_complete_goal_config confirms full end-to-end flow.

completion_promises.criterion_text: File not found raises GoalValidationError with descriptive message
completion_promises.evidence: split_sections() already handles FileNotFoundError by raising GoalValidationError(section='GOAL.md', message='File not found: {path}'). Integration test test_file_not_found_raises_validation_error confirms this path through parse_goal_md().

completion_promises.criterion_text: Empty file raises GoalValidationError indicating no sections found
completion_promises.evidence: split_sections() raises GoalValidationError with 'No sections found' message when content is empty. Integration test test_empty_file_raises_validation_error confirms this path through parse_goal_md().

completion_promises.criterion_text: All 9 sections parsed and assembled into GoalConfig
completion_promises.evidence: parse_goal_md() parses all 9 sections: Goal (free text), Source Documents (parse_table -> SourceDocument), System Prompt (free text), Generation Targets (parse_table -> GenerationTarget), Generation Guidelines (free text), Evaluation Criteria (parse_table -> EvaluationCriterion), Output Schema (extract_json), Metadata Schema (parse_table -> MetadataField), Layer Routing (parse_table -> dict). Test test_valid_goal_md_returns_complete_goal_config verifies all 9 fields are populated.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Public API exported from domain_config.__init__: parse_goal_md, GoalConfig, GoalValidationError
completion_promises.evidence: Updated domain_config/__init__.py to import parse_goal_md from domain_config.parser and added it to __all__. Tests TestPublicApiExports::test_parse_goal_md_importable_from_package, test_goal_config_importable, and test_goal_validation_error_importable all confirm exports work.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Integration test with valid GOAL.md fixture returns complete GoalConfig
completion_promises.evidence: Created domain_config/tests/fixtures/valid_goal.md based on the GCSE English tutor example from API-domain-config.md. TestParseGoalMdHappyPath contains 9 tests using this fixture: test_valid_goal_md_returns_complete_goal_config, test_goal_section_parsed_as_free_text, test_source_documents_parsed_as_structured_data, test_system_prompt_preserved_exactly, test_generation_targets_parsed, test_evaluation_criteria_parsed, test_output_schema_parsed_as_dict, test_layer_routing_parsed, test_metadata_schema_parsed.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Integration tests cover boundary conditions (50/49 chars, 100/99 chars, 3/2 criteria, 70%/69% reasoning)
completion_promises.evidence: TestParseGoalMdBoundary contains 9 boundary tests: test_goal_exactly_50_chars_passes, test_goal_49_chars_fails, test_system_prompt_exactly_100_chars_passes, test_system_prompt_99_chars_fails, test_generation_guidelines_exactly_100_chars_passes, test_exactly_3_evaluation_criteria_passes, test_only_2_evaluation_criteria_fails, test_exactly_70_percent_reasoning_passes, test_69_percent_reasoning_fails.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Integration tests cover negative cases (missing sections, invalid mode, invalid identifier, malformed JSON, missing keys, missing layer, below 70%)
completion_promises.evidence: TestParseGoalMdNegative contains 18 tests (9 parametrized for missing sections + 8 individual): test_missing_section_raises_validation_error[Goal/Source Documents/System Prompt/Generation Targets/Generation Guidelines/Evaluation Criteria/Output Schema/Metadata Schema/Layer Routing], test_file_not_found_raises_validation_error, test_invalid_source_document_mode_raises_error, test_invalid_criterion_identifier_raises_error, test_malformed_json_raises_error, test_output_schema_missing_messages_key_raises_error, test_layer_routing_missing_knowledge_raises_error, test_reasoning_below_70_percent_raises_error, test_empty_file_raises_validation_error.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Integration tests cover edge cases (whitespace variations, embedded headings, Unicode, percentage mismatch, nested fences, empty Valid Values)
completion_promises.evidence: TestParseGoalMdEdgeCases contains 11 tests: test_whitespace_variations_in_headings, test_table_formatting_variations, test_validation_error_includes_section_name, test_multiple_validation_failures_reported_together, test_metadata_all_fields_required_true, test_embedded_heading_not_treated_as_section, test_python_keyword_criterion_name_raises_error, test_unicode_characters_preserved, test_percentage_mismatch_uses_counts, test_nested_code_fences_in_output_schema, test_empty_valid_values_column.

completion_promises.criterion_text: pyproject.toml updated: testpaths includes domain_config tests
completion_promises.evidence: Updated pyproject.toml [tool.pytest.ini_options] testpaths from ["synthesis/tests"] to ["synthesis/tests", "domain_config/tests"]. Running 'pytest tests/ -v' now discovers and runs all domain_config tests.
Full test suite: 266 passed, 0 failed. Integration tests: 49 passed, 0 failed. Coverage: 99% across domain_config package. All quality gates met.
